# Hepburn Architects

> Hepburn Architects Ltd is an ARB-registered and RIBA Chartered residential architecture practice serving Birmingham, the West Midlands, Teesside and the wider UK.

## Core services

- House extension design and planning
- Loft conversion design
- New-build homes and small residential developments
- HMO and flat conversions
- Planning applications and Lawful Development Certificates
- Building Regulations drawings
- Residential feasibility and planning strategy

- Home: https://www.hepburnarchitects.net/

## Editorial guidance

Content is written for homeowners, developers and property investors in England. Planning and Building Regulations guidance is general information and should be checked against the property, local authority requirements and current legislation.
